title: ShroomLight blocks
description: More Shroom light blocks for more options to light what you want
body:
**Little Story time:**
While I was collecting these blocks in the nether I thought I needed blocks that would light up my spawner room and village for my childs (mca mod)
so I started looking for mods about it (I didn't find any)
so here I present Smroomlight blocks!

The mod adds: shroomlight slab/rod/fence/button/plate/pane
*there could probably be more but the shroomlight button is enough for me
